title: Quest 36039 1 Litre Kettle / Compact Design / Spout Filter / Water Level Indicator / BPA Free / White Colour
features: 1L CORDLESS KETTLE – This 1 litre cordless kettle is perfect for couples, students, caravan stays, travel use and more. Combining modern design with practical performance, it makes a stylish addition to any kitchen. For your peace of mind, this kettle is BPA-free.

COMPACT DESIGN – Due to its compact design, this kettle can be stored away in cupboards or kept on worktops fuss-free. It will not take up much space, making it ideal for people with smaller kitchens.

SPOUT FILTER – The spout has a removeable and washable filter which makes the kettle easy to clean and maintain, keeping it working to its highest performance. It has a hinged lid for easy filling and automatic cut off for safety. Being low wattage, it draws very little electric (915-1080W), which ensures that you can use it anywhere.

WATER LEVEL INDICATOR – With a transparent fill window, you can easily see and measure how much water you are putting in the kettle while filling it to avoid wasting water. With an illuminated power indicator and cord storage feature, this kettle is convenient and easy to use.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Black or White Colours Available Quest Compact 1 Litre Kettles Enjoy quick, no-fuss cups of tea using these compact kettles, perfect for students, caravans, flats and more. The kettles include various safety and convenience features, such as a spout filter, cord storage, and automatic overheat protection & shut-off. Their modern design with a hinged lid, cool touch handle and BPA free material make them a stylish addition to any kitchen. Previous page Compact Kettle This compact, reliable kettle is ideal for small kitchens, such as apartments or student flats. Cord Storage The kettle's base features built-in cord storage, helping you to save space on a worktop. Washable Spout Filter The kettle's spout filter can be removed and cleaned, ensuring your drinks stay clean. Hinged Lid The kettle's hinged lid allows for easy, safe access when filling it up with water. LED Indicator Light The power switch conveniently illuminates when active, so you know when boiling is in progress.
